## Harmony

- **Key / scale:** C Phrygian (100% scale-fit (heuristic)).
- **Most-used pitch classes:** 1 (C), 4 (F), b7 (Bb), 5 (G), b3 (Eb), b5 (Gb).
- **Voicing:** power-chord driven — 214 power-chord hits vs 0 triads
  across 1566 single notes.
- **Interval color (within chords):** tritone ×1, minor-2nd
  ×0, fifth ×339.

## Riff transcription

The most-repeated **moving** figures on the representative track (multi-bar phrases
preferred over single bars), transcribed verbatim in this skill's note syntax, with
scale degrees relative to C Phrygian. Sustained drone bars are pulled out separately as
the **Pedal / root center**. Onset grids share the percussion grid's 16th-note
convention below (with `|` marking each barline).
